# Lansa

> Lansa is Curaçao's career platform connecting certified job seekers, employers, and mentors. Build an AI-powered professional profile, earn a Lansa certification, and unlock real opportunities in the Caribbean job market.

Lansa helps job seekers stand out with a verified profile and sector certification, gives employers access to vetted local talent, and supports mentors who guide the next generation of Curaçao professionals.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Lansa for job seekers, employers, and mentors.
- [About](/about): Mission, team, and the Curaçao job market context.
- [For Business](/for-business): Employer offering — browse certified candidates and post jobs.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans for seekers, employers, and mentors in XCG.
- [Help](/help): Support articles and FAQ.
- [Resources](/resources): Career guides and learning content.
- [Login](/login): Sign in to your Lansa account.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a new Lansa account.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
